title: Doctors Set for Kids Age 3+, Kids Medical Kit with Realistic Stethoscope, Wooden Doctor Playset, Costume, Pretend Play Educational Toy Gift
features: Doctor kit for kids: Equip your child with the necessary medical tools including stethoscope, blood pressure monitor, thermometer, oxygen bottle, syringe, bandage and other diagnostic and therapeutic first aid items. It also includes a doctor costume and a convenient carrying bag for storage and transport.

Educational kids doctor play set: Encourage your child's imagination, empathy and bravery with this doctor kit. It teaches children about medical instruments and body parts and reduces anxiety and fear associated with doctor visits.

Safe and non-toxic: The doctor toy for toddlers is designed to provide a safe and reliable play experience for children with smooth, burr-free edges. Parents can rest assured that they can use our toddler doctor kits for an enjoyable role play experience with their friends.

Portable and easy to store: The toddler doctor coat set for kids comes with a spacious storage bag, making it convenient for storage and travel. Teach your child the importance of organization and help raise children's awareness of toy storage.
Ideal Gift for Kids: This kids doctor set is a perfect gift for various occasions such as parties, role play, class awards, holiday toy gifts, stocking stuffers and birthdays.
description: Product Description Doctor's Kit Children's Playset With our doctor's kit, children's imagination is stimulated, their creativity encouraged, and their communication skills enhanced, offering them new learning and experience opportunities. Familiarity with Medical Knowledge Pretending to be a doctor with a toddler doctor playset can help your child understand and become familiar with medical procedures, such as listening to the lungs when coughing and checking the heartbeat, developing empathy, and caring for others. They can also pretend to be a doctor and bandage wounds using a children's doctor kit that includes all the tools and equipment commonly used by doctors. Your little doctor will be dedicated to healing every patient and will eagerly participate in their next doctor's check-up! No Sharp Edges The doctor's kit for children is designed with smooth and rounded edges, without sharp corners or edges, to ensure safety while playing. Various Ways to Play The children's doctor kit is an excellent tool for introducing kids to different medical procedures. Equipped with a functional stethoscope that replicates authentic heartbeats and a blood pressure cuff, this doctor set is sure to be a hit! Portable and lightweight The toy set for child doctors comes with a linen bag to store all the medical toys. This is a perfect solution to the storage problem, helping your child develop the habit of tidying up and keeping everything easily accessible. Perfect Educational Gift for Children The EFO SHM doctor kit is an excellent gift for any occasion, including parties, role-playing, classroom rewards, holiday toy gifts, Christmas presents, and birthday gifts. When you give your children a doctor kit for their birthday, Christmas, Halloween, Easter, and other celebrations, it will create wonderful memories for them.
